nodes.title: To make it easier to see, go to settings --> Lite Graph --> Graph/ Link Render Mode --> Straight
Sets Frame Duration Based on Audio Duration

widgets_values: Paulie Walnuts sitting at Satriale's in a beige bomber jacket. He raises his right hand with a flat palm in a "stop" gesture and says, "that was different, Chrissy was shot. That was a paranormal event."
